name: jlpt-master
description: JLPT Master — Japanese study app (Vite + React build)

scripts.predev: node --max-old-space-size=4096 scripts/build-dict.mjs && node --max-old-space-size=4096 scripts/build-extras.mjs && node scripts/build-zh.mjs
scripts.prebuild: node --max-old-space-size=4096 scripts/build-dict.mjs && node --max-old-space-size=4096 scripts/build-extras.mjs && node scripts/build-zh.mjs
scripts.android: npm run build && cap sync android && cap open android
scripts.ios: npm run build && cap sync ios && cap open ios
